overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European-style town with half-timbered houses and cobblestone streets. The character passes through vine-covered archways and stone gates before emerging into a large bustling town square with a burning pyre at its center.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village main street with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street observing market stalls and NPCs on either side

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt walking ahead of the character toward the archway

entered.detail: wooden boat resting on the ground next to a stone water channel
wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed
tall half-timbered building with clock tower visible in the distance
traditional timber-framed house with white plaster and dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with half-timbered medieval houses. Market stalls and a yellow wooden boat are visible on the left, while NPCs walk about the street. A clock tower rises in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: vine-covered passage between stone and timber buildings

events.description: character passes under a large wooden archway completely covered in green vines
lighting becomes dappled and shaded as character moves under the dense vine cover

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded archway passage with flowering gardens visible to the right side

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress carrying a basket walking toward the character

entered.detail: large wooden archway completely covered in green ivy and hanging vines
wooden fence with blooming white and yellow flowers and dense greenery

segments.scene_description: The character passes under a large vine-covered wooden archway into a shaded passage. The lighting becomes dappled and green-filtered from the dense foliage overhead. Flowering gardens line the right side while the stone walls of buildings flank the left. The clock tower remains visible to the left in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone gate corridor with forge lighting

events.description: enters dark stone gate corridor with high walls blocking the sky
warm orange glow from a blacksmith forge becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit stone corridor toward the distant gate exit ahead

notable_agents.action: guard in red and white uniform standing near a wooden barrier

entered.detail: tall stone walls with arched ceiling creating a tunnel-like passage
warm orange light emanating from a blacksmith forge opening in the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone corridor with high walls that block out the sky. The environment shifts to mixed lighting with natural light fading and warm artificial glow from a blacksmith forge on the right. The corridor leads toward a distant arched exit with a red banner visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large medieval town square with market and burning pyre

events.description: exits the stone gate into a large open town square with bright sunlight
a large burning pyre with black smoke becomes visible in the center of the square

agents.ego_description: entering the bustling town square and approaching the central burning pyre

notable_agents.action: woman in green hat and dress standing with hands on hips observing the square

entered.detail: large stone archway with red heraldic banner marking the entrance to the town square
large wooden pyre with active flames and black smoke rising into the sky
market stall with red and white striped canvas awning

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stone gate into a bright, bustling town square filled with NPCs and market activity. A large burning pyre dominates the center of the square with smoke rising into the sky. Market stalls with colorful awnings line the sides, and the architecture features prominent half-timbered buildings surrounding the open cobblestone plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright medieval street through a series of narrowing passages that eventually open into a bustling town square. It begins along a sunlit cobblestone road lined with half-timbered houses and market stalls, moving toward a distant clock tower. As the camera passes under a vine-covered wooden archway, the lighting shifts to a dappled green glow filtered through dense foliage and flowering gardens. The scene then transitions into a dark stone corridor where natural light fades, replaced by the warm artificial glow of a blacksmith forge before turning toward a distant arched exit marked by a red banner. Finally, the camera emerges from the stone gate into a bright, open plaza dominated by a large burning pyre and colorful market stalls under a clear sky.
